import io
import string

fn rot13_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    ((b - 97 + 13) % 26) + 97
  else if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    ((b - 65 + 13) % 26) + 65
  else
    b
  end
end

fn rot13(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      let c = rot13_byte(b)
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    when None
      result = result
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  println(rot13(line))
when None
  println("")
end
